item.title: Arrays and vectors in C: solved beginner exercises
item.description: Solved array and vector exercises in C with safe input, sum, max value, and conditional counting.

item.title: Matrices in C: solved main and secondary diagonal exercise
item.description: Solved matrices exercise in C to compute main and secondary diagonal sums in square matrices.

item.title: memset in C: solved exercise to initialize arrays and buffers
item.description: Solved memset exercise in C to initialize memory correctly and safely.

item.title: Strings in C: solved exercises with strlen, strcpy, and strcmp
item.description: Solved strings exercise in C using strlen, strcpy, and strcmp for comparison, copy, and validation.

item.title: strcpy and strncpy in C: solved safe-copy exercise
item.description: Solved strcpy and strncpy exercise in C to copy strings while avoiding overflows.

item.title: strcmp and strncmp in C: solved string-comparison exercise
item.description: Solved strcmp and strncmp exercise in C for full and prefix-based comparisons.

item.title: strlen, strchr and strstr in C: solved text-search exercise
item.description: Solved strlen, strchr and strstr exercise in C for measuring and searching strings.

item.title: memcpy and memmove in C: solved overlap exercise
item.description: Solved memcpy and memmove exercise in C to copy memory with and without overlap.

item.title: 2D array in C: solved matrix exercise
item.description: Solved 2D-array exercise in C to traverse and sum matrix values.

item.title: Reverse string in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to reverse a string in C using two pointers.

item.title: Count vowels in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to count vowels in a C string.

item.title: Remove spaces in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to remove spaces from a C string in-place.

item.title: strtok in C: solved exercise for splitting CSV strings
item.description: Solved strtok exercise in C to split a string by delimiters and iterate through tokens.
